ogTitle: Tunkalilla vs Two Wells: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tunkalilla and Two Wells.
heading: Tunkalilla vs Two Wells — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tunkalilla, South Australia and Two Wells, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Two Wells has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Tunkalilla (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tunkalilla or Two Wells safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tunkalilla has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Two Wells scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tunkalilla scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Two Wells scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tunkalilla or Two Wells?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Two Wells has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
